case_title: NORTH FORK BANK VS. PAUL GOLDSTEIN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH FORK BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSTEIN, PAUL D/B/A BEVERLY HILLS PLAZA PHARMACY D/B/A RX UNLIMITED JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTH FORK BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDSTEIN, PAUL D/B/A BEVERLY HILLS PLAZA PHARMACY D/B/A RX UNLIMITED $1,268.75 PRINCIPAL, $117.39 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,566.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
